allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['engine.py','systems.py','ai.py','corruption.py','main.py']]; print\('all syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['engine.py','systems.py','ai.py','corruption.py','main.py']]; print\('all syntax OK'\)")
